1: Save me from all them that persecute me, and deliver me:
2: While there is there is none to deliver.
3: If there be iniquity in my hands;
4: (Yea, I have delivered him that without cause is mine enemy:)
5: Yea, let him tread down my life upon the earth, and lay mine honour in the dust. Selah. Selah.
6: And awake for me to to the judgment that that thou hast commanded.
7: For their sakes therefore return thou on high.
8: According to my righteousness, and according to mine integrity that is that is in me.
10: Which saveth the upright in heart.
11: And God is angry with the wicked with the wicked every day.
12: He hath bent his bow, and made it ready.
13: He ordaineth his arrows against the persecutors.
14: And hath conceived mischief, and brought forth falsehood.
15: And is fallen into the ditch which which he made.
16: And his violent dealing shall come down upon his own pate.
17: And will sing praise to the name of the LORD LORD most high.
